title: docs: fix typos
body:
This PR fixes spelling mistakes in markdown documents.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
/approve
LGTM
Did you find these with codespell?
@rhatdan  I find these misspellings with the help of [typos](https://github.com/crate-ci/typos) and [cspell](https://github.com/streetsidesoftware/cspell).
